product: MySQL connector in Lakeflow Connect (Public Preview)
tagline: The fully managed MySQL connector in Lakeflow Connect is in Public Preview.
what_it_does: The fully managed MySQL connector in Lakeflow Connect is in Public Preview. This connector enables incremental data ingestion from MySQL databases, including Amazon RDS for MySQL, Amazon Aurora MySQL, Azure Database for MySQL, Google Cloud SQL for MySQL, and MySQL on EC2. Contact your Databricks account team to request access to the preview.
why_it_matters: Using a read replica can reduce load on your primary database.

capabilities.title: Amazon RDS: 5.7.44 and later
capabilities.desc: Amazon RDS: 5.7.44 and later (both standalone and HA deployments)

capabilities.title: Amazon Aurora: 5.7.mysql\aurora.2.12.2 and later
capabilities.desc: Amazon Aurora: 5.7.mysql\aurora.2.12.2 and later (for HA setups, support is only from primary instance)

capabilities.title: Azure Database for MySQL Flexible
capabilities.desc: Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Servers: 5.7.44 and later (both standalone and HA deployments)

key_takeaway: The fully managed MySQL connector in Lakeflow Connect is in Public Preview.
